title: World-class repo hardening
request: Implement world-class repo improvement plan: dogfood kit into root, real update semantics, packaging cleanup, lint and format, CI matrix, coverage, changesets, CLI UX, publish prep, docs site.

requiredOutputs.name: architecture decision
requiredOutputs.evidence: DECISIONS.md ADRs 2026-07-02: dogfood root install, hash-aware update semantics, hygiene baseline, human-first CLI output.

requiredOutputs.name: maturity evidence
requiredOutputs.evidence: Repo audit passes with 63 checks; QUALITY_GATES.md and DOGFOOD.md updated with 2026-07-02 evidence.

requiredOutputs.name: security review
requiredOutputs.evidence: npm audit clean; SBOM validated; no new deps with CVEs; update command constrained by resolveInside path guards.

requiredOutputs.name: test evidence
requiredOutputs.evidence: npm run release:check passed: typecheck, lint, format, coverage-gated tests, install smoke, studio smoke, pack dry run.

requiredOutputs.name: doc updates
requiredOutputs.evidence: DECISIONS.md, DOCS.md, SPEC.md, README.md, DOGFOOD.md, UPGRADE.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, MESSAGING.md, DESIGN.md, docs/ site updated.

requiredOutputs.name: upgrade evidence when applicable
requiredOutputs.evidence: UPGRADE.md records hash-aware update flow; tests/update.test.ts covers pristine auto-update, conflict, force, dry-run.

requiredOutputs.name: release or rollback notes
requiredOutputs.evidence: Changeset .changeset/world-class-hardening.md staged; DEPLOYMENT.md documents npm Trusted Publishing release and rollback.

requiredOutputs.name: visual QA evidence
requiredOutputs.evidence: CLI-only change; output verified via CLI contract tests.

requiredOutputs.name: security review evidence
requiredOutputs.evidence: npm audit clean; SBOM validated; no new dependencies with CVEs; update command uses resolveInside path guards.
